laws.title: Public Law 7-51 | Federal Agent Law Training Mandate
laws.status_basis: The manifest and source-audit record classify the source as unrecoverable: the Trello record says the law is in Repealed Laws, the source file could not be recovered, and no statutory text is available for reconstruction.

provisions.text_summary: No recoverable statutory text is available.
provisions.evidence: Source audit reports source deleted or not found and no readable enactment text recovered.
provisions.notes: Keep only a source-limited historical note if the record is retained.

current_implementation.detail: The branch note asserts codification status despite an unrecoverable source and sits at a default Title 1 anchor.

laws.recommended_action: Remove the Trello link and keep only a concise source-limited historical note; do not invent operative text.

laws.title: Public Law 9-52 | The Federal District Wages Act of 2022
laws.status_basis: The source is unrecoverable Google-Drive debris, so the act cannot be validated or reconstructed from the record. The current branch also still carries an unrelated 28 U.S.C. section 135 salary reference to Public Law 9-52, but that reference cannot be expanded into operative text from the missing source.

provisions.text_summary: No recoverable statutory text is available.
provisions.evidence: The recovered source is a Google Drive permission-denial/Can't download page and no enactment text was recovered.
provisions.notes: Keep only a source-limited historical note; do not infer wage provisions.

current_implementation.detail: The branch note is parked at a subject-guess Title 29 anchor even though the source is unavailable.

laws.recommended_action: Remove the Trello link and retain only a source-limited historical note; if the record is kept at all, it should not imply a reconstructed wage rule.

laws.title: Public Law 9-54 | The Smart Label Congress Act
laws.status_basis: The source is unrecoverable Google-Drive debris and the canonical record classifies the law as repealed. The later repeal law PL-012-087 confirms the subject was treated as a repeal target, but the underlying text still cannot be reconstructed lawfully.

provisions.text_summary: No recoverable statutory text is available.
provisions.evidence: The recovered source is a Google Drive 'Can't download' page and no express Code citation was detected.
provisions.notes: Later repealer PL-012-087 is the only obvious follow-on; keep this record as historical only.

current_implementation.detail: The branch note is a subject guess at Title 2, but the source cannot support any operative codification conclusion.

laws.recommended_action: Remove the Trello link and keep only a concise source-limited historical note; do not treat it as current Code text.
